rules.rationale: Codex uses invalid-request (-32600) before initialization while Senpi currently uses its initialization-gate code (-32000); both reject with the same Not initialized message.
Codex uses invalid-request (-32600) for repeated initialize while Senpi currently uses its initialization-gate code (-32000); both reject with the same Already initialized message.
Each server truthfully reports its own product name and version in the initialize userAgent.
